mistake: Using falsy checks instead of explicit `is not None`
evidence: In `LoginAPIView.post`, the code checks authentication result with `if not user:` rather than an explicit `user is not None` check.
`loadTodos()` calls `todosListEl.replaceChildren();` without checking whether `todosListEl` is non-null (it is assigned from `document.getElementById("todos-list")`).
`loadTodaysTodos()` calls `todaysTodosEl.replaceChildren();` without checking whether `todaysTodosEl` is non-null (it is assigned from `document.getElementById("todays-todos")`).
